description_cn: 可以用来导出动画的求解器。布尔开关为True时，手动拖动子迭代输入端的数字滑块，可以查看物体变化的状态。
description_en: This is a solver that can be used to export animations. When the Boolean switch is True, you can manually drag the digital slider at the sub-iteration input to view the changing state of the object.

parameters.name: Tolerance
parameters.desc_cn: 距离小于此值的点将被合并成一个粒子。
parameters.desc_en: Points closer than this distance will be combined into a single particle

parameters.name: Momentum
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为False，则模拟会尝试尽快收敛。如果为True，则动力学更符合物理规律。
parameters.desc_en: If false, the simulation tries to converge as quickly as possible. If true, the dynamics are more physically based

parameters.name: Damping
parameters.desc_cn: 介于 0 和 1 之间的值，表示迭代之间速度的保留程度。仅当“动量”开启时使用。
parameters.desc_en: Value between 0 and 1, for how much velocity is preserved between iterations. Only used if Momentum is on

parameters.name: Animate
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为False，则仿真重置。如果为True，则每次收到此输入时，解将前进一帧。
parameters.desc_en: If false, simulation resets. If true the solution will advance by one frame each time this input is received

author: Kangaroo Team
